titleStmt.title: SII 4.1101: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1101. (A.R. No. 248 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kulōttuṁggacōḍadēvara vijayarājyasaṁvatsa 17 gu śrāhi [U]
ttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁtti nimittamuna śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvaraku palliAṟanu nappaṭi nivēdyamunaku
ṁ dellaṁbrālaku 8 nē mā 1 naṁjuḍlu reṇḍunu Ācaṁdrārkkamu naḍacunaṭṭugā ballahuṇḍu veddatribhuvanama
lladēvara kuṁccivaḍuvu doranāṇṭilōpali Ūriya kētarāju komaramaku suputruṇḍu kāśyapagōtra
muna cakragoṭṭamuna mallarāṇi veṁgināṇṭilōna guddavādilōni kruṁdhūṭi pannasa ballahuṇḍu nākicci
nadāni śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvara kiccina bhūmi kha 14 Iṁdda siṁhabṛhaspati gōdāvarilōna dhārāpūrvvakamu
sēsi vānasa mādhavabhaṭla koḍku mailārabhaṭla kiccina bhūmi kha 1 ṇḍunu Ī pannasakunai ratimūla dīniṁ bratipāliṁ
ccinavārevvaraina vāri cappulu nāśirassunnavi dīnika Aṣṭamūrttulu sahavāsuluṁ garaṇālu sthānādhipatiyu māhēśva
rulaku nēnuṁ butruṇḍa dīnikiṁ dappinavāru gaṁggakaṟuta veyi gayilala vadhiyiṁccinavāru vāraṇaśi vraccināru .
likhitaṁ peddanācāryyēṇa .
Digital edition of SII 4.1101 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
